headline: Is It Time To Reconsider GoDaddy (GDDY) After Its 53% One Year Share Price Slide?
summary: If you are wondering whether GoDaddy at around US$84.77 is a bargain, fully priced, or something in between, the numbers offer some clear clues. The stock has moved 0.6% over the last 7 days and 5.6% over the last 30 days, yet year to date it is down 28.5% and the 1 year return sits at a 53.0% decline, which may catch the eye of value focused investors.
